title: DJ Villager
description: This mod adds the DJ Villager profession!
body:
# DJ Villager Mod

![dj icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6nbOBLkB/8c96ee4161f77ce4bf0b38dd22b146feb5e03d0c.png)

## Bring the beats to your village with the DJ Villager Mod!

Looking to add some rhythm to your Minecraft world? The DJ Villager Mod introduces a new profession that brings music to life in your village. Transform a regular villager into a DJ Villager by placing a jukebox nearby and enjoy the musical benefits!

## Features:

- DJ Villager Profession: Convert a villager into a DJ Villager by placing a jukebox nearby.
- Music Disc Sales: The DJ Villager will sell a variety of music discs, allowing you to expand your in-game music collection.
- Note Block Purchases: Occasionally, the DJ Villager will buy note blocks from you, adding another layer to your trading options.

## Interactive and Fun:

- Enhance the ambiance of your village with music.
- Adds a unique and engaging profession to your villager ecosystem.

## Easy Integration:

- Seamlessly integrates with the existing villager system, making it simple to add to your game.

With the DJ Villager Mod, you can bring a whole new level of entertainment to your Minecraft villages. It's a fun and dynamic addition that will have you dancing to the beat in no time.

_Download now and let the music play with the DJ Villager Mod!_

## Compatibility:

The DJ Villager mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21, 1.20-1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/dj-villager/versions?l=fabric)
